Employees raised the issue, prompting Google to balance efficiency with the need to ensure the authenticity of the hiring process, acknowledging that competitors face similar challenges.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/google-ceo-sundar-pichai-says-we-have-introduced-at-least-one-round-of-in-person-interviews-just-to-make-sure/articleshow/123495271.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/google-ceo-sundar-pichai-says-we-have-introduced-at-least-one-round-of-in-person-interviews-just-to-make-sure/articleshow/123495271.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 11:03:31 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="221918" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123495252,imgsize-221918.cms"/></item><item><title>More Intel-like deals coming soon? While the government aims for financial returns without interfering in company operations, Intel cautions about potential risks, including reduced grant opportunities and adverse impacts on its global business.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/there-will-be-more-transactions-more-intel-like-deals-coming-soon-what-donald-trumps-aide-said/articleshow/123507643.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/there-will-be-more-transactions-more-intel-like-deals-coming-soon-what-donald-trumps-aide-said/articleshow/123507643.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 22:09:14 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1112666" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123507701,imgsize-1112666.cms"/></item><item><title>'At some point': Trump signals readiness for meeting Kim Jong Un; hints at renewed talks</title><description><![CDATA[Donald Trump expressed openness to meeting North Korean leader Kim Jong Un "at some point," ahead of South Korean President Lee Jae Myung's visit to the White House. Trump highlighted their past turbulent relationship, marked by initial threats and subsequent historic meetings, including a summit in Singapore and a DMZ encounter. Despite collapsed talks in Hanoi, Trump suggested a future meeting remains a possibility.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/at-some-point-donald-trump-signals-readiness-for-meeting-kim-jong-un-hints-at-renewed-talks/articleshow/123507457.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/at-some-point-donald-trump-signals-readiness-for-meeting-kim-jong-un-hints-at-renewed-talks/articleshow/123507457.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 22:14:37 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1022655" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123507847,imgsize-1022655.cms"/></item><item><title>Masterstroke! The Congress government defends the decision, stating Dasara is a national festival, not solely a religious one.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/mysuru-dasara-inauguration-row-bjp-says-banu-mushtaqs-faith-uncertain-minister-hits-back/articleshow/123503447.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/mysuru-dasara-inauguration-row-bjp-says-banu-mushtaqs-faith-uncertain-minister-hits-back/articleshow/123503447.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 17:40:24 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1669441" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123503755,imgsize-1669441.cms"/></item><item><title>Big statement! They criticize his past order against the Salwa Judum movement, claiming it emboldened insurgents. BJP leaders also question Reddy's alleged leniency towards Maoism, raising concerns about his suitability for the high constitutional office.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/is-congress-against-peace-sukma-bastar-villagers-oppose-india-blocs-vp-pick-write-letter-to-mps/articleshow/123505774.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/is-congress-against-peace-sukma-bastar-villagers-oppose-india-blocs-vp-pick-write-letter-to-mps/articleshow/123505774.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 19:50:27 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1157586" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123505827,imgsize-1157586.cms"/></item><item><title>AI and jobs: Microsoft AI CEO to workers; My central worry is many will be left behind</title><description><![CDATA[Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman cautions that AI's rapid advancement may outpace people's ability to adapt, leading to a significant skill gap rather than widespread job losses. He urges governments, companies, and educators to prioritize reskilling programs and digital literacy.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/not-widespread-layoffs-microsoft-ai-ceo-mustafa-suleymans-says-my-central-worry-is-that-many-people-will-/articleshow/123483046.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/not-widespread-layoffs-microsoft-ai-ceo-mustafa-suleymans-says-my-central-worry-is-that-many-people-will-/articleshow/123483046.cms</guid><pubDate>Sun, 24 Aug 2025 15:27:40 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="82436" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123483045,imgsize-82436.cms"/></item><item><title>'I have to go back again ... Police suspect an electrical object was used, causing severe wounds to her face and mouth. Darshitha, a mother from Hunsur, was found dead in a pool of blood.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/mysuru/mysuru-woman-mysteriously-killed-by-her-lover-at-lodge-room/articleshow/123505207.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/mysuru/mysuru-woman-mysteriously-killed-by-her-lover-at-lodge-room/articleshow/123505207.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 19:08:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>LAWRENCE MILTON</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1639161" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123505237,imgsize-1639161.cms"/></item><item><title>Why humans can't digest grass: Understanding the biological limitations</title><description><![CDATA[Humans lack the digestive enzymes and specialized anatomy to break down cellulose, the main component of grass, unlike herbivores. Early human ancestors consumed plant material, but their digestive systems weren't adapted for large quantities of cellulose-rich grasses. Grass offers minimal nutritional value, making it an unsuitable food source for humans, who require a varied diet.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/why-humans-cant-digest-grass-understanding-the-biological-limitations/articleshow/123506093.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/why-humans-cant-digest-grass-understanding-the-biological-limitations/articleshow/123506093.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 20:16:18 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SCIENCE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="103046" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123506171,imgsize-103046.cms"/></item><item><title>Inside Tommy Fleetwood’s net worth and love story with wife who once rejected him</title><description><![CDATA[Tommy Fleetwood, a top-earning golfer with over $31 million from the PGA Tour and $35 million from the DP World Tour, owes much of his success to his wife, Clare. Despite a 23-year age difference and initial hesitations about mixing business with romance, Clare became Fleetwood's manager and life partner.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/inside-tommy-fleetwoods-net-worth-and-love-story-with-wife-who-once-rejected-him/articleshow/123489726.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/inside-tommy-fleetwoods-net-worth-and-love-story-with-wife-who-once-rejected-him/articleshow/123489726.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 01:57:38 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="710685" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123489796,imgsize-710685.cms"/></item><item><title>Syko Stu’s brother speaks after Raja Jackson attack, issues scam alert</title><description><![CDATA[Independent wrestler Syko Stu was brutally attacked by Raja Jackson at a KnokX Pro Wrestling Academy event, resulting in severe injuries and an LAPD investigation. Watt, where money ultimately resolved similar issues.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/dallas-cowboys-owner-jerry-jones-makes-a-bold-move-to-block-micah-parsons-trade-exit/articleshow/123476916.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/dallas-cowboys-owner-jerry-jones-makes-a-bold-move-to-block-micah-parsons-trade-exit/articleshow/123476916.cms</guid><pubDate>Sun, 24 Aug 2025 00:25:30 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="19164" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123476920,imgsize-19164.cms"/></item><item><title>Why Musk called Trump's pick for US envoy to India a 'snake'</title><description><![CDATA[But by 2020, with Paul’s influence waning and Trump ascendant, Gor made the switch. The “snake” was learning to coil tighter around power.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/sergio-gor-donald-trump-elon-musk-snake-dj-us-ambassador-to-india/articleshow/123505963.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/sergio-gor-donald-trump-elon-musk-snake-dj-us-ambassador-to-india/articleshow/123505963.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 20:14:28 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>NIRMALYA DUTTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="932599" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123506167,imgsize-932599.cms"/></item><item><title>'Work from jail?' Shah expressed confidence that the bill, aimed at upholding constitutional morality, would pass despite opposition.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/what-about-those-inducting-criminals-kejriwal-targets-amit-shah-cites-own-160-days-jail-govt/articleshow/123499426.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/what-about-those-inducting-criminals-kejriwal-targets-amit-shah-cites-own-160-days-jail-govt/articleshow/123499426.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 15:14:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="40484" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123500334,imgsize-40484.cms"/></item><item><title>Legend opens up! The young cricketer represents Goa in domestic cricket. News of the engagement had sparked widespread attention online.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/did-arjun-tendulkar-get-engaged-to-saaniya-chandhok-sachin-tendulkar-with-first-official-answer/articleshow/123505439.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/did-arjun-tendulkar-get-engaged-to-saaniya-chandhok-sachin-tendulkar-with-first-official-answer/articleshow/123505439.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 19:24:13 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="37568" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123505440,imgsize-37568.cms"/></item><item><title>Aaron Rodgers already sidelined in Steelers’ plans as Mike Tomlin backs another QB</title><description><![CDATA[Aaron Rodgers' arrival in Pittsburgh is big news. Known for hits like 'Hirak Jayanti' and 'Milan Tithi,' Banerjee also contested elections on a BJP ticket before resigning from politics.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/kolkata/bengali-actor-and-bjp-leader-joy-banerjee-passes-away-after-prolonged-illness-matinee-idol-of-80s-dies-at-63/articleshow/123500926.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/kolkata/bengali-actor-and-bjp-leader-joy-banerjee-passes-away-after-prolonged-illness-matinee-idol-of-80s-dies-at-63/articleshow/123500926.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 15:41:12 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="18202" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123501294,imgsize-18202.cms"/></item><item><title>Israel hits Gaza hospital again, 15 dead including 4 journalists</title><description><![CDATA[An Israeli airstrike on Nasser Hospital in Khan Yunis, southern Gaza, resulted in at least 20 fatalities, including five journalists. The civil defence agency reported a double-tap strike, hindering rescue efforts. Among the deceased were journalists from Al Jazeera, Reuters, and a freelancer associated with AP, raising concerns about journalist safety in conflict zones.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-hits-gaza-hospital-in-double-tap-strike-khan-younis-nasser-hospitals-fourth-floor-hit-20-dead-including-five-journalists/articleshow/123498434.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-hits-gaza-hospital-in-double-tap-strike-khan-younis-nasser-hospitals-fourth-floor-hit-20-dead-including-five-journalists/articleshow/123498434.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 14:09:45 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="898619" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123499392,imgsize-898619.cms"/></item><item><title>Delhi Metro fare hike: DMRC raises prices starting today; check new rates</title><description><![CDATA[Delhi Metro fares have increased for the first time in years, impacting daily commuters. Effective Monday, fares are up by Rs 1 to Rs 4, with the minimum fare now Rs 11 and the highest Rs 64. Airport Express Line fares also see a rise. The DMRC calls the revision minimal but necessary to balance operational costs.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/infrastructure/delhi-metro-fare-hike-dmrc-raises-prices-starting-today-check-kilometre-wise-list-of-new-rates/articleshow/123500258.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/infrastructure/delhi-metro-fare-hike-dmrc-raises-prices-starting-today-check-kilometre-wise-list-of-new-rates/articleshow/123500258.cms</guid><pubDate>Mon, 25 Aug 2025 15:43:40 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1630363" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123500981,imgsize-1630363.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[IKEA’s new ‘barn’ format may reshape retail in India with 100-store rollout]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/ikea-lada-retail-format-pilot-convenience-home-accessories-19656325.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[IKEA is testing a new retail format called barn format, a smaller, leaner store concept designed to make the brand more accessible. Ranging from 2,500 to 10,000 sq meters, barn stores offer a limited selection of furniture and home accessories, with most items available via next-day delivery, and a simplified food menu. According to Tolga Öncü, Head of Retail at Ingka Group, the goal is to extend IKEA’s reach into neighborhoods without cannibalizing existing stores. Pilots are currently running in the UK, Poland, and Texas, with a final rollout plan expected by the end of 2025. In India, barn could enable IKEA to scale rapidly, potentially launching 100 stores in the first year and transforming the brand into a mass-market player.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Thu, 21 Aug 2025 18:21:19 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Swapnil Deshpande</dc:creator>

      <description><![CDATA[Bengaluru-based Refold AI has emerged from stealth with $6.5 million in seed funding led by Eniac Ventures and Tidal Ventures.       <title><![CDATA[Defence tech startup Olee Space secures $3 million seed funding, focuses on hardware-heavy expansion]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/startup/defence-tech-startup-olee-space-funding-operation-expansion-19655616.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Pune-based defence tech startup Olee Space has raised $3 million in seed funding, with plans to deploy 80% of it into hardware and 20% into operations. The company, founded in 2023 by IIT Bombay alumnus James Solomon, focuses on telecom, defence, and space technologies, including drones, high-altitude platforms, and directed energy weapons. Olee Space aims to launch its first commercial weapon within six months while maintaining separate civilian and defence operations.]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[1Kosmos raises $57 million Series B funding to scale global operations and fight cyber impersonation]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/startup/1kosmos-series-b-funding-passwordless-identity-ai-blockchain-19655607.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[New Jersey-based identity verification platform 1Kosmos has raised $57 million in Series B funding to scale globally and strengthen its fight against impersonation attacks. The platform combines blockchain-based identity storage with AI-powered verification, aiming to create a decentralised, passwordless future. “Passwords are becoming obsolete and are no longer a viable form of authentication. We are at the forefront of this change and transformation,” said Founder and CEO Hemen Vimadalal.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Mon, 18 Aug 2025 22:14:54 +0530]]></pubDate>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[India’s exporters rush to beat US 50% tariff deadline, face $11.5 billion loss risk, say industry experts]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/us-tariffs-impact-india-exporters-logistics-challenges-19655523.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India’s exporters are rushing to beat the August 27 US tariff deadline, with companies frontloading shipments and exploring costly alternatives. Sudhir Sekhri of AEPC warned of potential $11.5 billion losses and layoffs, citing pressure on logistics and shortened US customs timelines. Meanwhile, energy imports continue steadily, with Sumit Ritolia of Kpler noting 1.71–1.8 million barrels per day of Russian crude already unloaded, while US crude supplies remain limited. The full impact of the tariffs is expected from September onwards.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Mon, 18 Aug 2025 18:47:43 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Swapnil Deshpande</dc:creator>

      <title><![CDATA[India-China direct flights resumption likely to boost trade, tourism and economic ties]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/aviation/india-china-flights-resumption-economic-ties-impact-19653647.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India and China are set to resume direct passenger flights after five years, a move expected to boost trade, tourism, and economic ties. The resumption comes amid growing diplomatic engagement, recent trade approvals, and ahead of Prime Minister Modi’s visit to China for the SCO Summit. Pre-pandemic, over 8 lakh passengers traveled annually between the two countries, with cargo flows also significant. Restoring direct flights is likely to reignite strong demand, supporting business, tourism, and people-to-people exchanges.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Experts say proposed changes to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code will only work if backed by a functional framework, not left to court-driven resolutions.       <description><![CDATA[Gateway Distriparks expects domestic container volumes from its Ankleshwar Multi Modal Logistics Park deal to rise from 1,000–1,500 TEUs per month this year to 4,000 TEUs within two years, with EXIM services set to launch by April 2026. The asset-light venture, signed with the Sawariya Group, will operate on an EBITDA-sharing basis and target a ₹3,000 EBITDA per TEU.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Wed, 13 Aug 2025 15:56:17 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Swapnil Deshpande</dc:creator>
      <guid><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/companies/gateway-distriparks-ankleshwar-mmlp-deal-domestic-cargo-growth-19653260.htm]]></guid>
      <category><![CDATA[Business]]></category>
